advisories.title: Nissan discloses employee data breach linked to Oracle zero-day attacks
advisories.description: Nissan is warning that it suffered a data breach affecting current and former employees after threat actors exploited an Oracle PeopleSoft vulnerability in data theft attacks previously linked to the ShinyHunters extortion group. [...]

advisories.title: NAIC says public data stolen in ShinyHunters' PeopleSoft breach
advisories.description: The National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) says the ShinyHunters extortion group stole only publicly available data, outdated logs, and configuration files after breaching its systems by exploiting a zero-day vulnerability in an Oracle PeopleSoft server. [...]

advisories.title: CVE-2026-55957: Apache Tomcat: Authentication bypass with JNDIRealm and GSSAPI authenticated bind
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-55957
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:47 p.m. | 39 minutes ago
   
   Description : Missing Critical Step in Authentication vulnerability in Apache Tomcat when the JNDIRealm was configured to authenticate binds using GSSAPI allowed attackers to authenticate without provided the correct password.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.4, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.36, from 9.0.0.M1 through 9.0.100, from 8.5.0 through 8.5.100, from 7.0.0 through 7.0.
advisories.executive_summary:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-55957
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:47 p.m. | 39 minutes ago
   
   Description : Missing Critical Step in Authentication vulnerability in Apache Tomcat when the JNDIRealm was configured to authenticate binds using GSSAPI allowed attackers to authenticate without provided the correct password.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.4, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.36, from 9.0.0.M1 through 9.0.100, from 8.5.0 through 8.5.100, from 7.0.0 through 7.0.
advisories.ioc_note: No IOCs currently observed in public OSINT feeds for this advisory. This may indicate a newly disclosed vulnerability without active exploitation. Monitor CISA KEV, OTX, and ThreatFox for emerging indicators.

advisories.title: CVE-2026-55956: Apache Tomcat: Security constraints for default servlet ignored method
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-55956
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:46 p.m. | 40 minutes ago
   
   Description : Improper Authorization vulnerability in Apache Tomcat leads to security constraints specified for the default servlet ignoring any method or method omission configured as part of the constraint.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.22, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.55, from 9.0.0.M1 through 9.0.118, from 8.5.0 through 8.5.100, from 7.0.0 through 7.0.109. Other versio

advisories.title: CVE-2026-55955: Apache Tomcat: EncryptInterceptor not protected against replay attacks
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-55955
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:44 p.m. | 41 minutes ago
   
   Description : Improper Authentication vulnerability in Apache Tomcat allowed a replay attack against the EncryptionInterceptor in the cluster component.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.22, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.55, from 9.0.13 through 9.0.18, from 8.5.38 through 8.5.100, from 7.0.100 through 7.0.109.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 11.0.23, 10.1.56, 9.0.1
advisories.executive_summary:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-55955
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:44 p.m. | 41 minutes ago

advisories.title: CVE-2026-53434: Apache Tomcat: Invalid CRL configuration doesn't trigger failure for FFM Connector
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-53434
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:41 p.m. | 45 minutes ago
   
   Description : Detection of Error Condition Without Action vulnerability in Apache Tomcat when configuring CRLs for a FFM based connector.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.22, from 10.1.0-M7 through 10.1.55, from 9.0.83 through 9.0.118.

Users are recommended to upgrade to version 11.0.23, 10.1.56 or 9.0.119, which fixes the issue.
   
   Severity:  0.0 | NA

advisories.title: CVE-2026-53404: Apache Tomcat: Bad ornext processing in RewriteValve
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-53404
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:39 p.m. | 46 minutes ago
   
   Description : Always-Incorrect Control Flow Implementation vulnerability in Apache Tomcat's rewrite valve meant that if the first condition in an OR chain matched, subsequent non-OR conditions were skipped.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.22, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.55, from 9.0.0.M1 through 9.0.118, from 8.5.0 through 8.5.100. Other versions that have reached end of su

advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-50229
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:36 p.m. | 50 minutes ago
   
   Description : Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS) vulnerability in the number guess example for Apache Tomcat.

This issue affects Apache Tomcat: from 11.0.0-M1 through 11.0.22, from 10.1.0-M1 through 10.1.55, from 9.0.0.M1 through 9.0.118, from 8.5.0 through 8.5.100, from 7.0.0 through 7.0.109. Other versions that have reached end of support may also be affected

advisories.title: What the June 2026 Threat Technique Catalog update means for your AWS environment
advisories.description: The AWS Customer Incident Response Team (AWS CIRT) encounters patterns that repeat across engagements when helping customers respond to security incidents. We’re passionate about making sure that information is accessible so that everyone can improve their security posture and their organization’s resilience to disruption. The primary method we use to share this information is the […]

advisories.title: CVE-2026-34594 - Coolify: Authenticated Remote Code Execution via Command Injection in Destination Network Management
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-34594
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:21 p.m. | 1 hour, 4 minutes ago
   
   Description : Coolify is an open-source and self-hostable tool for managing servers, applications, and databases. Prior to 4.0.0-beta.471, an authenticated command injection vulnerability in the Destination Network Management functionality allows users with destination management permissions to execute arbitrary commands as root on managed servers. The "network" parameter is passed directly to she

advisories.title: CVE-2026-34597 - Coolify: Authenticated Host RCE
advisories.description:
CVE ID : CVE-2026-34597
   
   Published :  June 29, 2026, 8:18 p.m. | 1 hour, 8 minutes ago
   
   Description : Coolify is an open-source and self-hostable tool for managing servers, applications, and databases. Prior to 4.0.0-beta.470, a critical Authenticated Host Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability was discovered in Coolify. advisories.title: U.S. Targets Russian Cyber Spies With $10M Bounty Over Messaging App Attacks
advisories.description: The U.S. offers up to $10M for information on Russian hackers targeting Signal and WhatsApp accounts of officials and journalists. The U.S. government is offering rewards of up to $10 million for information leading to the identification of members of the Russian-linked groups UNC5792 and UNC4221. The hackers target government officials, military personnel, journalists, and […]

advisories.title: Warner bill would create federally vetted list for secure, trustworthy AI agents
advisories.description:
The bill empowers the FTC to create a registry for sellers of AI agent software certifying their privacy and cybersecurity protections.  
 The post  Warner bill would create federally vetted list for secure, trustworthy AI agents  appeared first on  CyberScoop .
